Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Conservator and the Trustee to appear on February 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the First Account has not been filed. FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Jun-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this was the second continuance regarding the account that was due. A previous Order to Show Cause regarding sanctions was issued on March 19, 2010. Sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day continue to run. A new Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee in Propria Persona to appear for failure to file the First Account. The return date is June 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. , in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Continued To Apr-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee Carole Cullum for failure to appear and for failure to file the First Account. The return date is April 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. If the First Account is not filed by close of business on April 19, 2010, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be imposed against the Trustee starting on that date and will run until the account is filed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
